title: What if Asuka woke up
wikitext:
[]: What if Asuka woke up? Post by chiefen » Sun May 13, 2007 5:07 am Found this in /b/. I'm not really sure if it should maybe go in Chit-chat, but since there could actually be a discussion on how the scene would happen and how she would react, I'll try the Discussion. So, what do you think she would do if she woke up while Shinji fapping on her?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 13, 2007 5:21 am Is that some Asukakke? The manga does have Asuka waking up -- and getting her retaliation for the beach scene in first. And her reaction in Instrumentality is canon -- even if there are a range of interpretations around the central theme of enquiring whether he can man up enough to face a woman and not just a doll, and expecting a negative response.

[]: Post by Ayana-Me » Sun May 13, 2007 9:18 am She would do exacty what she did after she woke up in the movie: go into the fetal position, scream, repeat "I don't want to die" for about two minutes and then go on a killing spree.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun May 13, 2007 10:10 am I doubt that since she wouldn't have depthcharges exploding around her. It would probably involve a rather awkward silence followed by a confrontation akin to the one during P3II.

[]: Post by Zkh » Sun May 13, 2007 10:13 am She'd make fun of Shinji for finishing so fast.

[]: Post by tinmeigut » Sun May 13, 2007 10:16 am She'd make fun of Shinji for finishing so fast.

[]: Post by Zkh » Sun May 13, 2007 10:22 am tinmeigut wrote: Ha, yea, agreed. How long did that take? A minute? 30 seconds?

[]: Post by tinmeigut » Sun May 13, 2007 10:33 am He makes the last little grunt about 28 seconds after he starts.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun May 13, 2007 11:14 am Zkh wrote: He makes the last little grunt about 28 seconds after he starts.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 13, 2007 11:23 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Why in gods name would you time that?

[]: Post by Zkh » Sun May 13, 2007 11:25 am Actually I timed it the second time I watched it just out of curiosity...

[]: Post by Opteron-O3 » Sun May 13, 2007 12:46 pm tinmeigut wrote: I remember Nerv can overlook Asuka's ward through a camera. Does it mean when Shinji did his handjob the process might have been recorded?

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun May 13, 2007 1:31 pm I foresee some possibilities. In the order of most likely... One : Ayana-Me wrote: She would do exact l y what she did after she woke up in the movie: go into the fetal position, scream, repeat "I don't want to die" for about two minutes and then... <snip>

[]: Post by DatDude » Sun May 13, 2007 1:47 pm Ummm dead Shinji ) ok for real with the drugs she was on probly not much

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 13, 2007 2:58 pm Zkh wrote: tinmeigut wrote: Ha, yea, agreed. How long did that take? A minute? 30 seconds?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun May 13, 2007 3:08 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Zkh wrote: tinmeigut wrote: Ha, yea, agreed. How long did that take? A minute? 30 seconds?

[]: Post by Opteron-O3 » Sun May 13, 2007 3:09 pm NAveryW wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Zkh wrote: tinmeigut wrote: Ha, yea, agreed. How long did that take? A minute? 30 seconds?

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun May 13, 2007 3:30 pm LAST FEW POSTS

[]: Post by sensei_juice » Sun May 13, 2007 5:04 pm Hehehe - I can just see the entirety of EoE being replaced by Asuka waking up and her and Shinji proceeding to get it on until 3I happens and everybody dies. Forever. Now THAT'S superflat.

[]: Post by Executor » Sun May 13, 2007 5:11 pm NAveryW wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Zkh wrote: tinmeigut wrote: Ha, yea, agreed. How long did that take? A minute? 30 seconds?
